title: From MCP to Scale: Pipelines That Build Themselves — Rafael Levi, Bright Data
summary: Bright Data's MCP infrastructure enables agents to inspect websites, generate production scrapers automatically, and maintain extraction pipelines when sites change. The system reduces manual intervention by using agents to repair broken collection jobs and switch from page parsing to reusable scripts.
